favorites.name: default
favorites.title: Default
favorites.description: Process with the app's full default pipeline (vision + summarization on the user's configured providers). No overrides.

favorites.name: vision-every-page
favorites.title: Vision extraction on every page
favorites.description: Skip the vision classifier and run visual extraction on every rendered page.

favorites.name: finetune-ingest
favorites.title: Fine-tune corpus ingestion
favorites.description: Factory corpus ingestion: llama_cpp summarizer (HTTP path -> 3x detailed extraction + relevancy + validation, on the LAN Gemma 12B QAT), codex vision for decks/diagrams. Keep flags stable so the config hash keeps the cache coherent.
